base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_ridley_walk — a character (boss) from 1986 metroid. Ridley — purple pterodactyl-dragon boss of Ridley's Lair. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ridley — purple pterodactyl-dragon boss of Ridley's Lair; 3-frame walk/flap cycle; breathes fireballs. Space Pirate commander
